title: Moyes wants players to believe Europe is within reach
fullText: Everton manager David Moyes is pleased his side ended their winless home run with a 2-0 victory over Burnley, and says he wants his players to be looking up the table and putting some of the top teams under pressure.MATCH REPORT: Everton 2-0 BurnleyAvailable to UK users only.
summary: Everton manager David Moyes is pleased his side ended their winless home run with a 2-0 victory over Burnley, and says he wants his players to be looking up the table and putting some of the top teams under pressure.
